Ad Text:
Nuage has partnered exclusively with a Melbourne-based enterprise to secure a Senior AI Engineer for one of the most technically progressive internal AI teams in the market. This is an opportunity to join a small, high-calibre SWAT team responsible for building production-grade GenAI solutions that are already shaping how the wider business operates.

This is not a role focused on experimentation alone. The team is delivering real enterprise AI platforms end-to-end, with engineers who are trusted to own architecture, design, and hands-on delivery from concept through to production. You will work closely with Data Science, Machine Learning, and Data Engineering specialists to solve genuine business problems using modern AI tooling, while having the autonomy to influence technical direction and explore new approaches.

The environment is particularly attractive for engineers who enjoy building properly: strong technical leadership, meaningful ownership, and access to a serious R&D budget for emerging AI technologies.

What they are looking for:

Proven enterprise GenAI build experience

Strong AWS depth across MLOps and Data Engineering services

Exposure to Snowflake or Databricks

Strong software engineering capability (Python ideally)

Experience leading end-to-end technical delivery

This is a hybrid Melbourne CBD role, suited to engineers who want to work at the forefront of enterprise AI in a team where technical standards are genuinely high. If you are looking for a role where you can build modern AI systems properly, this is worth exploring

About the Role 

We are seeking an AI Engineer to design, build, and integrate advanced AI capabilities into enterprise‑grade software solutions. This role focuses on implementing AI-driven features within a large web‑based platform, working collaboratively with product, data science, and engineering teams.

Key Responsibilities



Design and implement AI solutions within software products, including generative and agentic AI features.
Contribute to the design and integration of AI components within existing software architectures.
Build and deploy AI-enabled features in cloud‑native environments (e.g., AWS, GCP).
Work closely with product and data science teams to ensure AI solutions align with business objectives and compliance requirements.
Contribute to engineering best practices through high‑quality code, documentation, and collaboration.
Implement and support evaluation and monitoring mechanisms to ensure AI solutions meet accuracy and reliability standards.
Requirements 

Australian Citizenship (mandatory for NV1 defence clearance eligibility).
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.
3–5+ years’ experience in software engineering or technology development, with hands‑on experience designing and implementing AI solutions.
Experience working with generative AI and agentic AI systems in production or near‑production environments.
Solid understanding of software engineering principles, data storage, and cloud platforms.
Strong collaboration, problem‑solving, and communication skills, including technical documentation (e.g., UML).
Familiarity with web technologies and frameworks (React, Spring) is advantageous.
About Fivecast

Fivecast is a world-leading provider of cutting-edge digital intelligence solutions. We enable the world’s most important public and private organizations to explore masses of data and uncover actionable insights, critical to protecting global communities.

As a growing tech company with over 150 people globally, all team members are provided with the opportunity to directly contribute to our success, participate in the development of new and emerging technologies and grow their career in a challenging and dynamic high-tech environment.  We are headquartered in Adelaide, Australia with teams in Canberra, Virginia USA, and London UK.

Our Work Environment and Culture 

Our Adelaide based headquarters is a purpose-built tech hub centrally based in vibrant Hutt Street. We moved into this brand-new space in early 2023 to allow for continued collaboration, innovation & growth.
  
Our space has been specifically engineered for brainstorming, idea generation, random encounters across teams and to suit our casual, relaxed culture. This has been achieved through amazing features, including an arcade room, pool table, fully equipped kitchens with fruit and snacks, barista quality coffee machine, end of trip facilities (showers, lockers, bike storage, etc), as well as comfortable breakout spaces.

Fivecast has a connected work culture with team members taking advantage of our social clubs, local cafes, bars, pubs and sporting facilities for team activities. At Fivecast we understand the importance of a good work-life balance and support flexible work arrangements.

Fivecast is an inclusive employer, we value diversity of thought and experience and believe our inclusive culture contributes to our success. We are committed to building a workforce that is representative of the communities in which we live and work.
Additional information

Join a dynamic high-tech environment
Progression opportunities and share options
Amazing people, fun culture & a pool table

Job Title: Senior Software Engineer - Java & GCP - Contract
Ad Text:
Would you like to build a high-impact fraud technology function focused on protecting customers through AI-enabled, cloud native platforms? Would you like to join an engineering team tackling complex, real time challenges, designing resilient systems that operate at scale and have a direct impact on customer trust and security?

What You'll Be Working On

Building and evolving mission‑critical fraud detection and prevention platforms used by millions of customers
Designing and developing high‑performance, backend services in Java within a cloud‑native architecture
Deploying and operating scalable microservices on Google Cloud Platform (GCP) using Kubernetes
Leveraging AI and machine learning capabilities 
What We're Looking For

Deep hands‑on expertise with a modern Java stack
Proven experience building and running workloads on Google Cloud Platform
Solid knowledge of Kubernetes and containerised microservices
Experience or strong interest in leveraging AI within software systems (e.g. integrating ML models, using AI services, or building intelligent pipelines)
A background in high‑availability, high‑throughput systems (banking, payments, fraud, fintech, risk-engine's or similar highly regulated domains is a plus)
You'll join a team who work at the intersection of advanced software engineering and AI-driven intelligence, delivering platforms that continuously evolve. 

Duration: 12 months
Location: Melbourne CBD, Hybrid
Rate: $1000 per day

AI Engineer | 6-Month Contract | Start: ASAP
About the Role
AI Engineer to design, build, and deliver Generative AI solutions within a complex enterprise environment.
Strong software engineering fundamentals and hands-on LLM experience to deliver AI solutions that are practical, governed, and production-ready, working across business, architecture, data, security, and platform teams.
 
Key Responsibilities

Design, build, and deploy GenAI/LLM-based solutions aligned to enterprise use cases
Develop AI applications using RAG, prompt orchestration, summarisation, search, Q&A, and workflow automation patterns
Integrate AI capabilities with enterprise systems, APIs, data platforms, and internal knowledge sources
Partner with architects, data engineers, security, and governance teams to ensure solutions are scalable, secure, and compliant
Build reusable components, accelerators, and engineering patterns for enterprise AI delivery
Support evaluation, testing, monitoring, and optimisation of AI solution performance
Contribute to AI engineering standards and documentation
Identify and manage risks related to responsible AI, data privacy, and model behaviour
 
Required Skills and Experience

Proven delivery of AI-enabled solutions in enterprise environments as an AI, ML, or Software Engineer
Strong Python and SQL programming experience
Hands-on experience with GenAI/LLM solutions: prompt design, orchestration, and evaluation
Experience with RAG, embeddings, vector search, and enterprise knowledge retrieval
Solid understanding of API integration and modern software engineering practices
Experience with Azure or equivalent cloud platforms
Familiarity with tooling such as Azure OpenAI, OpenAI APIs, or vector databases
Experience deploying, monitoring, and supporting production AI solutions
Strong grasp of data privacy, security, and responsible AI in enterprise settings
Nice to Have

Experience with Azure AI Foundry, OpenAI/Anthropic models, Microsoft Fabric, or Copilot Studio
MLOps/LLMOps, CI/CD and application monitoring experience
Knowledge of authentication, access control, and secure enterprise architecture
Exposure to regulated industries: financial services, insurance, healthcare, or government
Experience in Agile delivery teams
 
What Success Looks Like

Secure, scalable, business-aligned AI solutions delivered within the contract period
Business use cases translated into robust technical designs and working solutions
Strong collaboration across engineering, architecture, data, and business teams
Governance and responsible AI guardrails applied without impeding delivery
Reusable assets and patterns that lift long-term enterprise AI capability

Job Title: Senior Data Engineer – Melbourne - $180,000 - Gain "productionised" AI
Ad Text:
Senior Data Engineer – Melbourne - $180,000 - Gain "productionised" Agentic AI and Gen AI 


Morgan Consulting are partnering with an exciting and fast growing organisation seeking a Senior Data Engineer to join their Data function. This is an opportunity to gain Agentic and Generative AI "Productionised" experience. This role offers strong Career Development within an organisation which operates with very little red-tape and has a supportive and positive culture.

About the Role:

The Senior Data Engineer is a hands on technical specialist responsible for building and supporting modern Databricks Lakehouse solutions on Azure within a complex retail data landscape. Working across both project initiatives and BAU, the role delivers robust, scalable data pipelines and curated analytical datasets that underpin enterprise BI, advanced analytics, and AI. You will collaborate closely with retail stakeholders, BI developers, and broader technology teams to transform high volume retail data into trusted, production ready insights that support critical business outcomes. This is an opportunity to gain Agentic and Generative AI "Productionised" experience.

What You Will Do:

Platform & Analytics Enablement

Enable enterprise BI, analytics, and AI driven insights by delivering scalable, high‑quality data solutions that support retail trading, operational, and customer use cases.
Build and optimise data pipelines and integrations that underpin reporting, advanced analytics, and AI/ML workloads.
Ensure analytics and reporting solutions are performant, secure, scalable, and fit for enterprise and retail decision making.

Azure & Databricks Data Engineering

Design, develop, and evolve modern data engineering solutions on Microsoft Azure, with a strong focus on Azure Databricks, Azure Data Factory (ADF), and Azure Data Lake Storage (ADLS).
Develop robust data transformations using PySpark, Databricks SQL, SQL, and Python.
Design, implement, and maintain curated analytical and dimensional data models aligned to retail BI, analytics, and AI requirements.

BI & Semantic Layer Delivery

Develop, optimise, and support Power BI datasets, semantic models, and reports to deliver trusted, business ready insights.
Administer Power BI environments, including workspace management, refresh orchestration, security, and access controls.
Align BI solutions to best practice data modelling, performance optimisation, and usability standards.

Production Support & Operational Excellence

Provide BAU support across data platforms, pipelines, BI, and analytics solutions, including issue resolution and root cause analysis.
Monitor data platforms and pipelines, implementing logging, alerting, and performance tuning.
Proactively identify and resolve data quality, availability, and performance issues in production environments.

Engineering Standards, DevOps & Security

Implement and maintain CI/CD pipelines for data and analytics solutions using Azure DevOps.
Apply cloud security, authentication, and access control best practices across Azure data and analytics services.
Contribute to design reviews, code reviews, and technical discussions to ensure robust, maintainable, and scalable solutions.
Support the definition and continuous improvement of data engineering, analytics, and BI standards.

Governance & Collaboration

Contribute to the design, adoption, and communication of data governance practices across the data platform.
Partner closely with retail business stakeholders to translate requirements into reliable technical solutions.
Collaborate with engineering, data science, infrastructure, and DevOps teams to deliver secure, production ready solutions.
Balance delivery across project initiatives and ongoing BAU activities within a complex retail data environment.


What You Will Bring:


Strong hands on Data Engineering experience with SQL, Python, PySpark and Databricks SQL.
Strong experience designing and delivering data solutions on Microsoft Azure - Azure Databricks, Azure Data Factory (ADF), Azure Data Lake Storage (ADLS).
Proven experience designing and building data warehouses and analytical data models, including scalable lakehouse and dimensional modelling patterns.
Strong understanding of data integration, analytics platforms, and reporting architectures in enterprise environments.
Hands‑on experience administering and developing Power BI solutions, including Dataset and semantic model design, Strong DAX capability, Performance optimisation and governance.
Experience working in DevOps environments, including - CI/CD pipelines, Source control, Release and environment management.
General understanding of cloud authentication, security, and access control concepts, including role‑based access and data security principles.
Demonstrated ability to deliver both project work and BAU/support, operating confidently in a production data and BI environment.
Proven retail sector Data Engineering experience to Senior Data Engineer level.

Why Join:

Opportunity to gain Agentic and Generative AI "Productionised" experience.
Strong Career Development.
Amazing culture with very little red tape.

If you are a Senior Data Engineer with strong stakeholder management, who has experience in a fast-paced retail environment, and is outcome focussed we would love to hear from you. Apply now or reach out for a confidential conversation.
